overall.description: Static third-person view of a wizarding common room from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy). Characters in robes sit on cushions around tables with glowing crystal balls, while natural light filters through tall Gothic windows with purple curtains. The medieval stone interior features magical tapestries and ornate furnishings.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval wizarding common room with Gothic stone architecture and tall arched windows draped in purple curtains. Several characters in wizard robes sit on cushioned ottomans around tables holding glowing crystal balls. Natural light diffuses through the windows, illuminating a large tapestry on the left wall. Throughout the segment, NPCs occasionally enter from the sides - a woman in a yellow dress from the left at 20 seconds and a robed figure from the right at 45 seconds - while the seated characters remain mostly stationary.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a medieval wizarding common room where the stillness of the architecture is punctuated by the subtle movement of its inhabitants. It begins with a wide view of the Gothic stone interior, where natural light diffuses through tall arched windows draped in purple curtains to illuminate a large wall tapestry. As the camera lingers, the quiet scene is animated by the soft glow of crystal balls resting on tables before seated figures in robes. The composition then shifts in dynamic as a woman in a yellow dress enters from the left, followed by a robed figure appearing from the right. Finally, the shot settles back into the serene ambiance of the room, contrasting the fleeting movement of the NPCs with the stationary presence of the students on their cushioned ottomans.
